input_boolean.garage_auto_close_enabled.reason: Used as a condition for the night close rule, and another rule explicitly turns it off when charging starts; keeping it on preserves the intended automatic closure behavior.

input_boolean.garage_door.reason: The night-close rule checks for the on state and then turns it off, indicating off is the secured/closed post-state to preserve.

input_boolean.nursery_window.reason: A temperature-driven rule turns this on to open the window, so off is the default closed state to preserve unless ventilation is intentionally requested.

input_boolean.nursery_window_latch.reason: The clean-mode rule turns it on to disable the latch, and the window-open rule requires the on state; off is the safer enabled-latch default.
